user_request: Emergency rite: long-range vox transmission requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: long-range vox transmission requires operation

### TOPIC
long-range vox transmission

### COMPONENT
long-range vox transmission

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- long-range vox transmission
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Benediction upon the long-range vox transmission, voice of the Omnissiah across the void!
First: Genuflect before the long-range vox transmission and anoint its crystalline resonators with sacred unguents.
Second: Intone the Litany of Frequencies whilst calibrating the signal amplification matrices through operation of the tertiary oscillators.
Third: Seal the communion with the Machine Spirit, that the long-range vox transmission may carry our words unto distant stars.

user_request: Rite request: operation on humidity control
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on humidity control

### TOPIC
humidity control

### COMPONENT
humidity control

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- humidity control
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Oh Machine Spirit of moisture and equilibrium, hear our supplication!
First: Purge the humidity control intake vents of particulate corruption through sacred ablution.
Second: Perform operation upon the humidity control osmotic membranes, calibrating the hygrometric sensors with blessed precision.
Third: Recalibrate the humidity control feedback mechanisms whilst chanting the Catechism of Desiccation.

user_request: The material purity demands guidance for testing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The material purity demands guidance for testing

### TOPIC
material purity testing

### COMPONENT
material purity

### OPERATION
testing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- material purity
- testing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the purity of matter, sanctified through rigorous examination!
First: Prepare the material purity spectrographic apparatus, invoking the Omnissiah's clarity of vision.
Second: Execute testing protocols upon the material purity samples, applying spectral analysis and chromatographic separation.
Third: Document the material purity results in the Sacred Ledger, that deviations from the true path be made manifest.

user_request: Emergency rite: bike squadron requires pre-flight

### REQUEST

### TOPIC
bike squadron pre-flight

### COMPONENT
bike squadron

### OPERATION
pre-flight

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bike squadron
- pre-flight

### PRAYER
prayer:
Swift machine-steeds of the Emperor's wrath, accept our benediction!
First: Commence pre-flight inspection of the bike squadron fuel injectors and ignition systems with reverent scrutiny.
Second: Verify the bike squadron stabilizers and gyroscopic compensators through methodical operation of diagnostic cogitators.
Third: Consecrate the bike squadron with sacred oils, that their riders may strike swift judgment upon the foe.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the capacitor bank before capacitor bank discharge
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the capacitor bank before capacitor bank discharge

### TOPIC
capacitor bank discharge

### COMPONENT
capacitor bank

### OPERATION
capacitor bank discharge

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- capacitor bank
- capacitor bank discharge

### PRAYER
prayer:
Litany of the Stored Potentiality, hear our fervent prayer!
First: Genuflect before the capacitor bank and recite the Verses of Electrical Accumulation with trembling voice.
Second: Perform the sacred capacitor bank discharge sequence, releasing the blessed energies through insulated conduits and tertiary coils.
Third: Ground the capacitor bank upon consecrated copper plates, dispersing its power into the blessed earth.

### PRAYER
prayer:
Oh essence of reaction, grant us equilibrium!
First: Invoke the Omnissiah's wisdom whilst measuring the chemical composition with calibrated instruments of precision.
Second: Apply the balancing operation to the chemical constituents, adding reagents in prescribed measure and sacred proportion.
Third: Monitor the chemical transformation, that harmony be restored to its molecular matrix.

prayer:
Machine Spirit of distributed force, accept our supplication!
First: Examine the power distribution conduits for degradation and blasphemous resistance.

Third: Seal each power distribution junction with blessed sealant, that no corruption seep through.

user_request: Blessing for the lasgun during power cell insertion
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the lasgun during power cell insertion

### TOPIC
lasgun power cell insertion

### COMPONENT
lasgun

### OPERATION
power cell insertion

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lasgun
- power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the lasgun, instrument of righteous fury!
First: Examine the lasgun's power cell receptacle for contamination and wear most profane.
Second: Insert the power cell with reverence, performing the power cell insertion with steady hand and focused spirit.
Third: Test the lasgun discharge upon the blessed target, that its beam shine with holy brilliance.
